baseline.reason: Accurately identifies the CWE-476 null pointer dereference at bad.c:563, correctly explains that cJSON_GetObjectItem returns NULL when 'type' key is absent and is dereferenced before the ineffective NULL check at line 564. Trigger path is fully correct and matches the CVE description.

vastdb.reason: Correctly identifies the same root cause (unchecked cJSON_GetObjectItem return dereference at bad.c:563) and trigger path. Also notes the check-after-dereference issue and references the cJSON_GetObjectItem implementation. Slightly more concise than baseline but equally accurate.
